artifacts.summary: Blocker investigation: fuel-based termination is flawed, recommends direct case-based proof without recursion

next_steps: Revise strict_intermediate_exists to use direct case-based proof (2 density applications max), then fix NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder

fuel_decrease_sorries.root_cause: subformulaClosure cardinality is not the correct termination measure - consecutive distinguishing formulas are not subformula-related
fuel_decrease_sorries.recommendation: Replace with direct case-based proof using at most 2 density applications

reflexive_case_sorries.root_cause: When MCS is reflexive, seriality witnesses may all be equivalent to it
reflexive_case_sorries.recommendation: Use irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future for non-reflexive, density iteration for reflexive
